# Feature Request

## Summary

Provide a clear, technical summary of the feature you are requesting.

## Problem This Solves

Describe the actual problem or limitation you are facing.
Explain why the current behavior is insufficient.

## Proposed Solution

Describe the feature you are proposing and how it would work.

- What would change?
- What new behavior would be added?
- How would it integrate with the existing ingestion pipeline or schema?

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you have tried or considered.

- [ ] Alternative 1
- [ ] Alternative 2

## Impact

Explain how this feature would improve the project.

Examples:

- Reduces manual work
- Improves ingestion accuracy
- Adds missing SOS functionality
- Enhances cross‑engine compatibility
- Simplifies contributor workflow

## Additional Context

Add any extra details, examples, or SOS API references that help explain the request.

## Checklist

Before submitting, confirm:

- [ ] I have searched existing issues
- [ ] This feature aligns with the project’s goals
- [ ] I have described the problem, not just the solution
- [ ] I have explained why the feature is useful
